CONFIDENTIAL — Project Meridian

To: Privacy + Data Governance
From: General Counsel
Date: 24 May 2026

Re: Cross-border transfer programme for FY 2026

We will execute the EU SCCs module 2 for the controller-to-processor flow with the
Frankfurt vendor. The personal data export to Japan continues to rely on the European
Commission adequacy decision.

For Indonesia and Vietnam, we are adopting ASEAN MCCs pursuant to the Jan 2025 joint
guide. Group-wide binding corporate rules remain approved by the lead supervisory
authority. The transfer outside Singapore register has been updated; counsel logged the
Schrems II reliance for the US module 2 flow.

The PRC subsidiary will submit the CAC standard contract filing this quarter. Separately,
APEC CBPR certification renewal is pending.
